compliance.assurance_rationale: ASD Essential Eight E8.08 Regular backups — backup-job success-rate monitoring is the direct operational evidence of the regular-backups maturity criterion.
APRA CPS 234 23 Incident management — verified backups are a pre-requisite for incident recovery under the APRA incident-management paragraph.
BSI IT-Grundschutz 2023 OPS.1.1.2 Ordered ICT operation — backup-job success evidence is part of the ordered-ICT-operation documentation.
